subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which city is the capital of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी किस शहर है?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan. It is a prominent city located in the heart of the state.
explanation_hi: जयपुर राजस्थान की राजधानी है। इसका स्रोता राजस्थान के में जवाब के स्रोता है।
explanation_ar: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan. It is a prominent city located in the heart of the state.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the most famous festival of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान के सबसी मनोजाना क्या है?
explanation_en: The Kite Festival is a popular event celebrated in Rajasthan, marking the beginning of the Makar Sankranti festival.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the founder of Mewar Kingdom?
question_hi: मैवर का सदायक है राजकट का?
